title: Release Gates, Migration, Recovery, Support, and Defense · Stakeholder Software Mission
summary: A joint player, accessibility, algorithms, security, quality, packaging, and support board. The board needs reconciled player outcomes, topology and solver proof, closed accessibility barriers, bounded local data, immutable artifacts, migration checks, failure and rollback rehearsals, support ownership, and explicit residual-risk acceptance. Planned artifact: Deliver Maze Production, Recovery, and Residual-Risk Defense with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constrai…
objectives: Validate endpoints, adjacency, passability, uniqueness policy, and reported cost against an independent route checker.
Set supported grid and action limits, reject excess early, compare representative devices, and name residual risks.
Use bounded data-only formats and reject pickle or executable object reconstruction for untrusted saves.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-maze-solver-python cumulative accessible desktop maze portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python grid, graph, search, state, and scheduler models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native Tcl, Tk, tkinter, windows, Canvas, fonts,
focus, input devices, assistive technology, files, platform timing, installers, display scaling,
packaging, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazePolicy:
    rows: int = 12
    columns: int = 16
    seed: int = 314159
    maximum_cells: int = 16_384
    reduced_motion: bool = False


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class MazeEvidence:
    revision: str
    topology_digest: str
    action_trace_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str
    artifact_digest: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python maze solver portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: maze-production-defense-dsdnlp
# Competency: maze-production-defense.
# Case 4690: a museum kiosk accessibility review.
# Operating constraint: all graph claims need an independent witness.
# Changed case: replace pointer input with a single-action keyboard path.
def evidence_maze_production_defense_dsdnlp(release_gates: int = 12, passed_gates: int = 12, rehearsed_failures: int = 6, open_critical_barriers: int = 0, rollback_minutes: int = 4) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_dsdnlp = "dsdnlp-plndsd-4690"
    assert evidence_variant_dsdnlp
    evidence_axes_dsdnlp = (
        "griddsdnlp",
        "topology4690",
        "searchplndsd",
        "eventdsdnlp4690",
        "access4690dsdnlp",
        "recoveryplndsd4690",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_dsdnlp)) == 6
    if release_gates < 8 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-gate"
    if rehearsed_failures < 4 or open_critical_barriers > 0:
        return False, open_critical_barriers, "recovery-gap"
    if rollback_minutes < 0 or rollback_minutes > 15:
        return False, rollback_minutes, "rollback-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-maze-release"
